unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in EtherLotto.play()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference external calls (bank.transfer and msg.sender.transfer) in the play() function, which could lead to reentrancy.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Weak PRNG in EtherLotto.play()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings describe the use of a weak PRNG based on block.timestamp and the deprecated sha3() function, which are logically related.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight issues with the outdated Solidity version and its constraints.
